query:
INSERT INTO host_listings (
  hostName,
  profilePhotoUrl,
  languages,
  bio,
  activities,
  overseasExperience,
  funFacts,
  whyHost,
  culturalPassions,
  otherPassions,
  email,
  wechatOrPhone,
  district,
  availability,
  availabilityComments,
  maxGuests,
  cuisineStyle,
  title,
  menuDescription,
  foodPhotoUrls,
  dietaryNote,
  mealDurationMinutes,
  pricePerPerson,
  kidsFriendly,
  hasPets,
  householdFeatures,
  status
) VALUES (
  'Sookie',
  NULL,
  '["English", "Mandarin", "Cantonese"]',
  'Hello everyone! I''m Sookie, originally from Guangdong and currently based in Shanghai. I work in the music industry, and I have a huge passion for cooking.

I often cook with friends at each other''s homes, and I''m always curious to explore different cuisines. There are no limits for me—if you tell me a dish you want to try, I will research it, practice it, and even add my own twist to make it taste better.

I love creating fusion food. Western dishes, Cantonese, Chaoshan, Shanghainese food, as well as Western and Chinese desserts, are all within my expertise. When you come to my place, you can enjoy authentic local flavors and also my secret, unique homemade recipes.

I believe that music, food, and art are deeply connected. Cooking is my way to relax and unwind, and it brings me so much joy. I really want to share this happiness with you.

Let''s step into the magical world of food together! You''re all warmly welcome to my home for a meal.',
  '["cooking-class"]',
  'Originally from Guangdong, bringing Southern Chinese culinary traditions to Shanghai',
  'Works in the music industry and sees deep connections between music, food, and art',
  'Cooking is my way to relax and unwind. I want to share the joy and happiness that food brings me with travelers from around the world.',
  'Passionate about the diversity of Chinese regional cuisines - from Cantonese to Chaoshan to Shanghainese traditions',
  'Music industry professional who finds creative expression through cooking and fusion cuisine experimentation',
  'sookie@example.com',
  'Available upon booking',
  'Jing''an',
  '{"Monday": ["lunch", "dinner"], "Tuesday": ["lunch", "dinner"], "Wednesday": ["lunch", "dinner"], "Thursday": ["lunch", "dinner"], "Friday": ["lunch", "dinner"], "Saturday": ["lunch", "dinner"], "Sunday": ["lunch", "dinner"]}',
  'Available starting May 1, 2026. Not available before May 1st.',
  4,
  'Cantonese, Chaoshan, Shanghainese, Western Fusion, Chinese & Western Desserts',
  'Soul Food So Good',
  'I love creating fusion food and experimenting with different cuisines. My specialties include authentic Cantonese dishes, Chaoshan delicacies, Shanghainese classics, and creative Western-Chinese fusion creations. I also make both Western and Chinese desserts.

When you visit, I can prepare whatever you''d like to try - just tell me your preferences and I''ll research it, practice it, and add my own special twist to make it even better. Every meal is a unique culinary adventure tailored to your tastes.',
  '["https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/HaCGApwOGmIchJjn.jpg", "https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/uAJEgrbylIFXrCRi.jpg", "https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/RDlIiLoPNvJEUglB.jpg", "https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/UZRxwzLhjrXlImIi.jpg", "https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/pFVmFRkkUihdZPGD.jpg", "https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/tRcZcUKoqFSUEqDm.jpg", "https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/wTRUvlcRblxawEcA.jpg", "https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/wzHTQsJOzGVkVrbK.jpg", "https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/wyVHJBZqoyQXgoxk.jpg", "https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/OJxwVWRAMQXnTZbY.jpg", "https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/piXNlNjsCWaOxoEQ.jpg", "https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/vjYkVxMjjwXaYLog.jpg"]',
  'Can accommodate most dietary restrictions including vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free. Please inform me of any allergies in advance.',
  150,
  200,
  TRUE,
  FALSE,
  '[]',
  'approved'
);
